channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Craig Carton talks 'normalized' sports betting, being open with friends and family about gambling addiction
item.description: Craig Carton, co-host of Fox Sports’ “Breakfast Ball," has been open about his gambling addiction and serves as a FanDuel responsible gaming consultant.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Anthony Davis leaves his Dallas debut with an injury after seismic Luka Doncic trade
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis left in the third quarter with a lower-body injury and didn't return in his debut with the Dallas Mavericks on Saturday after the seismic trade that sent Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utes offense struggles again in loss to West Virginia
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.V. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah basketball team shot just 41 percent from the field and lost its third straight road game at West Virginia Saturday, 72-61.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Thomas Detry shoots 65 to take 5-shot lead into the final round of the Phoenix Open
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Thomas Detry shot a 6-under 65 on Saturday to take a five-shot lead into the final round of the Phoenix Open as he chases his first PGA Tour victory.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 6 Florida beats top-ranked Auburn 90-81 and ends the Tigers' 14-game winning streak
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. scored 19 points and Alex Condon added 17 as No. 6 Florida rallied from an early deficit and beat No. 1 Auburn 90-81 Saturday, ending the Tigers' 14-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ben Simmons waived by the Nets after the team and former No. 1 pick agree to a buyout
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ben Simmons was waived by the Brooklyn Nets on Saturday after the team agreed to a buyout with the last remaining link to a failed era of building around All-Stars. The No.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Utah HC gives up season-high 7 goals to Carolina
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (ABC4 Sports) - After two overtime thrilling victories, the Utah Hockey Club gave up a season-high seven goals in a 7-3 loss Saturday to the Carolina Hurricanes. Seth Jarvis had two goals and two assists, and Sebastian Aho had two goals and an assist for the Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ahead of Real Madrid clash, Man City given a scare by third-tier Leyton Orient in the FA Cup
item.description: Ahead of a Champions League playoff against Real Madrid, Manchester City survived a scare at third-tier Leyton Orient to advance to the fifth round of the FA Cup. City hosts Madrid on Tuesday in the first of a two-legged playoff.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Padres sign outfielder/first baseman Connor Joe for 2025 season
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made a move to bolster their roster for the upcoming season by signing outfielder and first baseman Connor Joe to a one-year contract, President of Baseball Operations and General Manager A.J. Preller announced Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Eagles defensive end Brandon Graham returns from torn triceps for Super Bowl
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Philadelphia Eagles star defensive end Brandon Graham was cleared to return from a torn triceps suffered 11 weeks ago and will play in the Super Bowl against Kansas City. The 36-year-old Graham was thought to be done for the season after he was injured in a Nov.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: California residents protest, threaten lawsuits over state's refusal to follow Trump's trans athletes ban
item.description: California residents gathered outside a public school federation board meeting to protest its intent to not follow Trump's order on banning trans athletes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brandel Chamblee, who has long opposed LIV Golf, says he's second-guessing himself after playing with Trump
item.description: Amid President Donald Trump's involvement in PGA and LIV talks, Brandel Chamblee admitted the president has him second-guessing his LIV opposition.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Giants great Victor Cruz speaks highly of Saquon Barkley's drive for greatness despite being on Eagles
item.description: New York Giants legend Victor Cruz gave his flowers to Philadelphia Eagles star running back Saquon Barkley, whose drive for greatness inspires him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House Divided: Wife an Eagles fan, husband cheers for Chiefs in NOLA
item.description: When one of the couple grows up in Kansas a Chiefs fan, and the other in South Jersey an Eagles fan, one would expect the marriage to be tested but Jaime and Dave Dailey make it fun.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Chiefs, Eagles players with ties to San Diego area
item.description: Super Bowl Sunday is sure to be a fun one as the Philadelphia Eagles and Kansas City Chiefs battle it out for the Vince Lombardi Trophy.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: UMass will pay student who made half-court $10,000 after insurance company said his foot was on line
item.description: A UMass student who made a half-court shot during a women’s basketball game halftime promotion will get his $10,000 prize from the school itself after the insurance company refused to pay because, it said, his foot was on the line.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raiders legend Fred Biletnikoff keeps daughter's dream alive
item.description: LOOMIS, Calif. - Fred Biletnikoff still goes to a lot of Raiders games. "Sometimes I don't know why," laughed the Hall of Fame wideout. "It's just the history." Fred has a lot of history with the Raiders.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: Jimmy Butler headed to Golden State, Andrew Wiggins to Miami, AP source says
item.description: Jimmy Butler got what he wanted. He's being traded out of Miami and got a new contract in the process. The Heat and the Golden State Warriors have agreed on a deal that sends Butler to the Bay Area, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Madsen brothers lead Utes past Colorado, 72-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Lawson Lovering scored 12 points and Utah kept Colorado winless in the Big 12 beating the Buffaloes 72-59 on Wednesday night. Ezra Ausar and reserve Mason Madsen each scored 10 points for the Utes (13-9, 5-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jeremiah Trotter Jr. continues legacy of Eagles Super Bowl linebackers
item.description: His dad, known as the "Ax Man" for his signature sack celebration, played eight seasons in Midnight Green and is a member of the team's Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, NewsNation

item.title: Travis Kelce fined for unsportsmanlike conduct in AFC title game
item.description: While there was no flag thrown on the play, Kelce got hit with an $11,255 fine for unsportsmanlike conduct after a one-yard Mahomes rushing touchdown
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, NewsNation

item.title: Former NFL player Rashard Cook looks to shape next generation at Mater Dei
item.description: "We had great experiences past high school, and I want to recreate that for the guys that want that experience.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Rumors swirl about Warriors re-acquiring Kevin Durant amid chaotic NBA trade deadline
item.description: (KRON) -- The 2025 NBA trade deadline has provided even no shortage of excitement so far, and the Golden State Warriors could be the next team to get involved.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Report: Bulls trade Zach LaVine to Kings
item.description: The Chicago Bulls are trading star shooting guard Zach LaVine to the Sacramento Kings, according to ESPN's Shams Charania.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Rory McIlroy overpowers Pebble Beach and wins in a runaway
item.description: The combination of one of golf's biggest stars and America's most scenic coastal golf course was the just the spark the PGA Tour needed, and both lived up to their reputations Sunday in the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Canadian fans boo U.S. National Anthem at hockey game amid trade war
item.description: Canadians aren’t too happy with the tariffs being imposed on their country by U.S. President Donald Trump. Trump signed an order Saturday to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Canada as well as Mexico and China, which drew swift retaliation and sparked a trade war.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Luka Doncic to the Lakers, Anthony Davis to the Mavs in blockbuster trade, AP source says
item.description: Luka Doncic is being traded by the reigning Western Conference champion Dallas Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers for Anthony Davis, a person with knowledge of the agreement said early Sunday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4
